pages.title: Auto-Giving Guide Books
pages.text: Configure automatic book distribution in $(o)config/botzmobleveling-common.toml$:$(br2)$(li)$(bold)givePlayerGuideOnFirstJoin$() - Player handbook$(li)$(bold)giveDeveloperGuideOnFirstJoin$() - Technical reference$(br2)Both default to $(o)true$() in the config spec. Set to $(o)false$() to disable.

pages.title: Manual Distribution
pages.text: Give books via commands:$(br2)$(bold)Player Guide:$()$(br)/give @s patchouli:guide_book{patchouli:book:"botzmobleveling:mob_leveling_player_guide"}$(br2)$(bold)Developer Guide:$()$(br)/give @s patchouli:guide_book{patchouli:book:"botzmobleveling:mob_leveling_developer_guide"}

pages.title: Patchouli Requirement
pages.text: Patchouli is an $(bold)optional$() dependency. If not present:$(br2)$(li)Guide books won't be given automatically$(li)Players see a chat message about missing Patchouli$(li)The mod functions normally otherwise$(br2)Include Patchouli in your modpack for the full documentation experience.

pages.title: Custom Books
pages.text: You can create your own Patchouli books for your modpack:$(br2)$(li)Place book JSON in $(o)assets/<namespace>/patchouli_books/$()$(li)Reference the same structure as these guides$(li)Link between books using entry URLs$(br2)This allows deep customization for RPG modpacks with lore integration.
